_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ensure all systems security operations and maintenance activities are properly documented and updated as necessary.
reference_document_element_description: Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job configuration updates, and operational documentation maintenance.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-021 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.543), OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.526).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.546). Shared vocabulary: [maintenance]. DCWF-only terms [activities, documented, ensure, necessary, operations, properly] vs WIDAI-only terms [cleanup, configuration, data, documentation, execute, job] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.888 (P=0.885, R=0.891). Balanced P/R — the 15-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.0%). "Ensure all systems security operations and maintenance activities are properly d" and "Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.614 > STS 0.546 (gap +0.068). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [maintenance] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.4%. Shared tokens: [maintenance]. DCWF-only: [activities, documented, ensure, necessary, operations, properly]. WIDAI-only: [cleanup, configuration, data, documentation, execute, job].
